title: Tensura: Beyond Worlds
description: Enter the world of Tensura, featuring custom quests, unique NPCs, powerful bosses, exclusive features, addons, and much more.
body:
# **🌍 Tensura Beyond Worlds**

A server-focused Tensura modpack built around progression, PvP, lore, custom bosses, deep questing, exclusive add-ons, and a world designed to keep expanding.

**Discord**  
https://discord.gg/UTZmjjpuv3

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/xUyZzlx0c_g?start=7" title="Tensura Beyond Worlds Trailer" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

A custom **Fabric 1.21.1** Tensura experience built primarily around the **TRBeyond server**, focused on **balance, progression, PvP elements, lore, custom content, and long-term replayability**. Built on top of **Tensura Reincarnated**, this pack is designed to deliver a more structured and content-rich multiplayer experience with **custom quests, original server systems, rotating bosses, deep progression, and exclusive add-ons**.

Whether you want to push through the main storyline, progress through new systems, challenge custom bosses, or roll for your favorite characters on our server-exclusive features, **Tensura Beyond Worlds** is built to offer a deeper and more complete Tensura experience.

## **⚔️ A Server-First Tensura Experience**

***

This pack is built mainly for **multiplayer** and is centered around the experience of joining **Tensura Beyond Worlds**.

It is designed to expand the core Tensura experience with:

- More structured progression
- More server-driven content
- More replayable systems
- More PvP-oriented balance
- More reasons to keep progressing long after you start

This is not just a basic collection of mods thrown together. The goal of this pack is to create a **more complete Tensura world** with its own identity, lore, and progression.

## **📖 Story, Quests, and Worldbuilding**

***

The server currently includes **18 main quests**, giving roughly **2 to 3 hours** of core story content, alongside **10+ side quests** with more already planned.

These quests are built to make the world feel more alive through:

- Custom NPC interactions
- Story-driven progression
- Deep server lore
- Side content and worldbuilding
- Future quest expansion

The goal is to make progression feel like an actual journey instead of just grinding stats.

## **⬆️ Progression Systems**

***

Tensura Beyond Worlds goes far beyond the base experience with expanded systems built around:

- **Prestige**
- **Soul Grade**
- **Skill Locking**
- **Quest-based progression**

These systems are meant to create a deeper long-term progression loop and give players more meaningful goals as they continue growing stronger.

**These systems help add**

- More meaningful resets
- Better long-term build progression
- Stronger incentives to keep pushing forward
- More account growth over time
- More control over what skills you keep and invest in

## **🗂️ Quest Variety**

***

The quest systems are designed to feel much more varied and rewarding than the usual repetitive format.

**Quest types include**

- Daily
- Weekly
- Required
- Repeatable

This creates a more active progression loop whether you are:

- Pushing story content
- Grinding progression
- Prestiging
- Working toward server goals
- Preparing for PvP or boss content

## **🏰 Boss Content**

***

One of the major highlights of the server is its custom boss content.

This includes a **custom boss tower with 6 bosses** that will **rotate monthly or bi-monthly**, helping keep the experience fresh over time.

You can expect:

- Unique encounters
- Progression-focused challenges
- Content designed for repeat play
- New reasons to keep coming back as rotations change

## **⚖️ Balance and PvP**

***

A major focus of Tensura Beyond Worlds is **balance**.

The pack is designed with:

- PvP elements in mind
- Progression balance in mind
- Long-term server health in mind
- Systems that feel strong without becoming completely unmanageable

The goal is to preserve the fun and fantasy of Tensura while still giving players a more competitive and structured experience.

## **🧩 Included Add-Ons**

***

This pack includes custom TRBeyond content and add-ons built to expand the world in major ways.

**Included highlights**

- **Beyond Adventures**
- **Better Subordinates**
- **Unique Monsters**
- **Slime Throne Extras**

These help expand the pack with more content, progression, systems, and gameplay variety.

### **Beyond Adventures**

Adds additional progression content and includes the **Beyond Adventures Contract System**, which is **server-exclusive**.

This system gives players the chance to roll for some of their favorite characters while still keeping the experience tied into gameplay and server progression.

### **Better Subordinates**

Expands subordinate gameplay and gives players a deeper experience with systems surrounding their companions and progression.

### **Unique Monsters**

Adds more variety and excitement to encounters with powerful and interesting monsters that help make the world feel more alive.

### **Slime Throne Extras**

Additional content support that helps round out the overall pack experience even further.

## **🎴 Server-Exclusive Contracts**

***

The **Beyond Adventures Contract System** is a **server-exclusive feature**.

This system gives players a chance to obtain their favorite characters through contracts while still keeping the broader experience tied into actual gameplay and progression.

It is meant to add excitement and collectability without replacing the core progression of the server.

## **Additional Features**

***

The pack also includes useful supporting mods and integrations such as:

- **Lootr**
- **Distant Horizons**

These help improve the overall gameplay experience and make the pack feel better suited for a larger multiplayer world.

## **🔧 Setup**

***

This modpack is for **Fabric 1.21.1**.

Because **Tensura Reincarnated** is currently in **Early Access**, players who have access to the EA files through the Patreon will need to manually place the current Tensura files into the modpack for it to load correctly.

**Current Tensura version**

- **1.9.3.6**

## **🌐 Join the World**

***

**Server IP**  
play.trbeyond.com

**Discord**  
https://discord.gg/UTZmjjpuv3

**Website**  
https://trbeyond.com/

**Server Trailer**  
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xUyZzlx0c_g&t=7s

## **📈 More to Come**

***

Tensura Beyond Worlds is still growing.

More is planned, including:

- More side quests
- More story content
- More rotating content
- More bosses
- More progression
- More custom systems
- More worldbuilding

The goal is to keep expanding this into an even bigger Tensura experience over time.

## **Unofficial Fan Project Notice**

***

Tensura Beyond Worlds is an **unofficial fan-made project inspired by Tensura** and built around **Tensura Reincarnated**.
